title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Scientific QA
abstract: We study retrieval-augmented generation methods for scientific question answering and evaluate robustness across domains.

title: Efficient Long-Context Transformers in Literature Analysis
abstract: This paper proposes efficient long-context transformer strategies for processing full-length scientific papers.

title: Neural Citation Recommendation with Graph Contrastive Learning
abstract: We introduce a graph contrastive objective for citation recommendation and report strong gains on benchmark datasets.

title: Domain-Adaptive Embeddings for Cross-Disciplinary Search
abstract: Cross-disciplinary retrieval is improved via domain-adaptive embedding alignment and lightweight distillation.

title: Benchmarking Chinese Academic Summarization Models
abstract: We present a benchmark for Chinese academic summarization and compare instruction-tuned models.

title: Hybrid Keyword-Vector Search in Academic Portals
abstract: A practical hybrid retrieval pipeline combining lexical filtering and dense vector reranking for paper search.

title: Interactive Paper Reading Assistant with Memory
abstract: We build an interactive reading assistant that maintains contextual memory for multi-turn document discussions.

title: Reliable Metadata Extraction from Noisy PDF Sources
abstract: This work focuses on robust metadata extraction from noisy PDFs using layout-aware pretraining and post-correction.

title: Scalable Vector Index Maintenance for Dynamic Corpora
abstract: We discuss index maintenance strategies for frequently updated academic corpora with low downtime.

title: User-Centric Evaluation of Literature Discovery Systems
abstract: A user study evaluating search quality, trust, and efficiency in AI-assisted literature discovery systems.
